inputs.label: Current Interest Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: The prevailing market interest rate for the reference period.

businessContext_i18n.en: The prevailing market interest rate for the reference period.

inputs.label: Expected Rate Change (bps)
inputs.businessContext: Anticipated shift in interest rate in basis points (1 bps = 0.01%).

businessContext_i18n.en: Anticipated shift in interest rate in basis points (1 bps = 0.01%).

inputs.label: Portfolio Value (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Total notional value of the fixed-income portfolio.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total notional value of the fixed-income portfolio.

inputs.label: Modified Duration (years)
inputs.businessContext: Sensitivity of bond price to yield changes, adjusted for yield.

businessContext_i18n.en: Sensitivity of bond price to yield changes, adjusted for yield.

inputs.label: Convexity
inputs.businessContext: Second-order measure of curvature in price-yield relationship.

businessContext_i18n.en: Second-order measure of curvature in price-yield relationship.

inputs.label: Hedge Ratio (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of portfolio hedged using derivatives or swaps.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of portfolio hedged using derivatives or swaps.

inputs.label: Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Statistical confidence for VaR and tail risk estimation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Statistical confidence for VaR and tail risk estimation.

inputs.label: Volatility Regime
inputs.businessContext: Market volatility environment for stress testing.

businessContext_i18n.en: Market volatility environment for stress testing.

rules.message: Convexity is unusually low relative to duration. Verify inputs.
Hedge ratio must be between 0% and 100%.
Extreme volatility regime typically requires rate change > 100 bps.

thresholds.message: Projected loss exceeds 5% of portfolio value. Immediate review recommended.
Low convexity amplifies risk under large rate shifts.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
